Video.summary: A waterfall forms a cascading stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waterfall Wonder

Video.summary: Bob paints a "dreamscape."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: That Time of Year

Video.summary: A tiny shack lies upon a gentle slope.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Old Home Place

Video.summary: Watch and learn as Bob Ross unfolds this beautifully soft wooded scene with gently rippling brook, all inside an oval shape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wooded Stream Oval

Video.summary: Sentry firs surround a peak and lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mighty Mountain Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints a fishing village in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Time

Video.summary: Bob paints nature's varied hue.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blaze of Color

Video.summary: Bob paints a home on a cliff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Deep Wilderness Home

Video.summary: A roiling sky incites ocean violence.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Stormy Seas

Video.summary: Bob paints an isolated forest river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Mist Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a western scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Western Expanse

Video.summary: Bob paints a quaint winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Frosty Winter Morn

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Creek

Video.summary: Bob uses his skill to create a bog.

Video.title: Marshlands

Video.summary: Bob creates illusions of depth and dimension.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Dimensions

Video.summary: Visiting artist Ben Stahl uses a more traditional painting method to bring out the coy loveliness of a little girl.

Video.title: Portrait of Sally
